mapper.select: SELECT id, ticket_id, ticket_no, flow_type, transition_id, transition_name, from_status, to_status, from_assignee_id, to_assignee_id, operator_id, operator_role, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM ticket_flow_record WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time ASC

SELECT r.id, r.ticket_id, r.ticket_no, r.flow_type, r.transition_id, r.transition_name, r.from_status, r.to_status, r.from_assignee_id, r.to_assignee_id, r.operator_id, r.operator_role, r.remark, r.create_time, r.update_time, r.create_by, r.update_by, r.deleted FROM ticket_flow_record r INNER JOIN ticket t ON t.id = r.ticket_id WHERE r.deleted = 0 AND t.deleted = 0 AND t.workflow_id = #{workflowId} ORDER BY r.create_time DESC, r.id DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, ticket_id, ticket_no, flow_type, transition_id, transition_name, from_status, to_status, from_assignee_id, to_assignee_id, operator_id, operator_role, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted FROM ticket_flow_record WHERE ticket_id = #{ticketId} AND deleted = 0 AND to_status = #{toStatus} AND from_status IS NOT NULL AND from_status <> to_status ORDER BY create_time DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
